entry.title: IDC 70CDCR20D00000009 (P00003) awarded to GEO GROUP, INC., THE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS LOS ANGELES

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00003 IS TO ADD REIMBURSABLE CLIN 0008 TO FACILITATE THE PURCHASE OF PPE FOR THE DETAINEE POPULATION HOUSED AT THE ADELANTO DETENTION FACILITY IN SUPPORT COVID 19.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:contingencyHumanitarianPeacekeepingO.description: PRESIDENTIAL ISSUED EMERGENCY DECLARATION, OR A MAJOR DISASTER DECLARATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
